activated_rules.rule_name: Letter of Credit (LC) exception - Not activated
General goods description with invoice reference active

consignor.motivation: Consignor 'Bulten Sweden AB' from certificate is explicitly found in invoice header and footer with matching country Sweden after normalization. The company name and country match exactly without discrepancies. No conflicting parties identified, satisfying rules 4.1.0, 4.1.3.1, and 4.1.4.

consignee.certificate_value: Volvo Cars Chengdu Zhongjia Automob Manufact. Ltd(764)
consignee.invoice_value: VOLVO CARS CHENGDU Zhongjia Auto Manuf. Ltd (764-2CKR)
consignee.motivation: Consignee name in certificate matches invoice 'VOLVO CARS CHENGDU Zhongjia Auto Manuf. Ltd' with minor textual variation but identified as same entity (after normalization per 4.1.3.1-4.1.3.6 rules). Country China matches exactly. Verified against invoice 'Payer' and 'Delivery address' fields following consignee priority rules (4.2.0.2).

goods_description.motivation: Article number 'SEG-26D-445085' in certificate matches invoice '988910' normalized as 'SEG-26D-445085' with allowed normalization. The detailed goods description 'Screws, other self-tapping (TT, PT, RF)' matches exactly in both documents. Certificate expresses explicit invoice reference and invoice date allowing general goods description acceptance (4.3.5).

quantity.motivation: Quantity '3900 pcs' from certificate exactly matches invoice '3900 PCS' for relevant article number. Units correspond after normalization. Numeric value matches exactly with allowed normalization of case letters and spacing. No conflicting quantity observed.

origin.motivation: Origin country 'Sweden' as stated in certificate is explicitly present in invoice as 'SE' (ISO Country code) under origin field. The EU origin normalization rule applies and confirms equivalence between 'Sweden' and 'SE'. No contradictory origin found.

overall_assessment.decision_summary: Alla verifieringskontrollpunkter för avsändare, mottagare, varubeskrivning, kvantitet och ursprungsland överensstämmer exakt mellan certifikatet och fakturan.
overall_assessment.human_explanation: Alla kontrollpunkter i certifikatet stämmer överens med fakturan. Dokumenten kan godkännas automatiskt utan behov av manuell granskning.
